case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA VS. DARRAGH J. SKELTON

docket_entries.description: (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-14-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VIVIAN HO, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT DARRAGH SKELTON IS PRESENT. PARTIES NEGOTIATED A SETTLEMENT AND AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO CONTINUE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT SKELTON, DARRAGH J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-18-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SKELTON, DARRAGH J.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKELTON, DARRAGH J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, DAMAGE TO FIRE TRUCK THROUGH DEFENDANT'S NEGLIGENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT SKELTON, DARRAGH J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN` APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY VIRGINIA HO, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT DARRAGH J. SKELTON DID NOT APPEAR. THE PREVIOUS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT DID NOT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
